title: Trade unions, farm outfits to strengthen protests against U.S. trade deal, Labour Codes
content: They will hold mahapanchayats in all States to rally farmers and workers against the “pro-corporate” policies of the Union government

title: Power utilities told to gear up for summer demand surge
content: Energy Special Chief Secretary K. Vijayanand asks DISCOMs to ensure 24x7 quality supply as power demand in Andhra Pradesh may touch 280 MU per day in May

title: Wayanad township visit: CM expresses regret over Mammootty getting caught in row
content: Pinarayi says if any Communist Party of India (Marxist) activist was involved in the social media criticism that the actor was subjected to, he was sincerely apologetic for that

title: Acharya Sabha blames government for ghee adulteration in Tirupati laddus
content: Hindu Dharma Acharya Sabha urges greater vigilance in temple administration and says only Dharmic and responsible individuals should manage temple affairs to prevent violations of Shastra norms

title: ‘Saffron crowd’ wants to swallow Tamil Nadu, DMK won't allow it: Stalin
content: Mr. Stalin also launched a scathing attack against his rival, AIADMK chief Edappadi K Palaniswami, accusing him of becoming a “slave” to the BJP in order to become CM

title: Sreedharan seeks public support for Kerala high-speed rail plan
content: Former DMRC chairman’s plan has drawn attention as neither the State nor the Union government has expressed interest in taking it forward

title: Railway law enforcement agencies crack down on drug peddlers as pre-poll surveillance intensifies
content: Data on drug seizures by the Railway Protection Force and other agencies between January and the first week of March indicate that the Railways remain a key route for narcotic trafficking

title: KGMOA opposes extension of OP hours
content: Govt. increases OP hours by 1 hour from the present 8 a.m. to 1 p.m. Doctors say they are already working without adequate rest and extending OP hours is going to push them to severe physical and mental stress

title: TTD plans digital procurement portal to streamline tenders
content: AI-based system to verify suppliers, analyse market trends and integrate tendering, supply management and payments through a single digital platform aimed at enhancing transparency and efficiency, says official

title: SUEZ begins door-to-door survey of KWA consumers
content: The ₹1,141.28-crore project, funded by the Asian Development Bank (ADB), to begin with surveys and asset mapping

title: Around 40% of flights to West Asia operational amid transit visa delays for expats
content: The full restoration of operations depends on regulatory approvals and airspace reopening, while many Indian nationals continue to struggle with delayed transit visas in Saudi Arabia and Oman, alongside rising ticket prices.

title: Left MPs slam Rahul Gandhi for his ‘inappropriate remarks’ against Pinarayi government
content: CPI(M)’s John Brittas and CPI’s P. Sandosh Kumar raised the issue at the INDIA bloc meeting on March 9, arguing that such comments were injurious to the bloc’s unity

title: A new Khamenei as Supreme Leader, oil above $100: Did Trump miscalculate Iran?
content: Operation Epic Fury escalates as Iran installs Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader following his father's death. With oil prices soaring above $100 a barrel and attacks widening across the region, the conflict is morphing into a larger, riskier war with no clear end in sight.

title: Two Akanksha Singhs, one UPSC rank: Ghazipur candidate confirmed at 301
content: The UPSC clarified that Akanksha Singh from Ghazipur, Uttar Pradesh, secured rank 301 in the Civil Services Examination 2025, resolving confusion over two candidates with the same name claiming the same rank. The commission confirmed the successful candidate's details, including roll number and parentage, amidst reports of another Akanksha Singh from Bihar also claiming the rank.

title: 'You were in bad form, I was out for two years': Ishan Kishan's witty reply to Abhishek Sharma
content: India's T20 World Cup 2026 heroes Ishan Kishan and Abhishek Sharma shared their journeys of overcoming criticism and self-doubt. Kishan highlighted the importance of self-belief and hard work after a two-year absence, while Sharma credited the unwavering support of teammates and management for his crucial final performance. Both emphasized the power of positive company and continuous improvement.

title: Indonesia to procure BrahMos missiles from India: Report
content: In 2023, BrahMos Aerospace, a company jointly owned by the governments of India and Russia, told Reuters it was in advanced discussions with Jakarta on a potential agreement estimated to be worth between $200 million and $350 million. Rico said the agreement was "part of the modernisation of military hardware and defence capabilities, especially in the maritime sector."

title: ‘I over-relied on AI’: Developer says Claude Code accidentally wiped 2.5 years of data
content: A developer's attempt to migrate websites using an AI coding assistant, Claude Code, resulted in the deletion of two websites and all their backups. Over-reliance on the AI led to a critical error when a crucial state file was missing, causing the AI to issue a destructive 'terraform destroy' command.

title: 'Not punishment': Pakistan coach breaks silence on Babar Azam exclusion
content: Pakistan's white-ball coach Mike Hesson clarified that senior players' absence from the Bangladesh ODI series isn't punishment for the T20 World Cup exit. He emphasized it's an opportunity to test emerging talent, citing players like Sahabzada Farhan and Shamyl Hussain.  However, former pacer Sikander Bakht alleged Hesson overruled selectors during World Cup squad finalization, creating internal friction.

title: Battle of the rolls: How Mamata vs EC over SIR has set stage for 2026 Bengal assembly elections
content: West Bengal’s Special Intensive Revision of electoral rolls has evolved from a technical checkinto a major political and constitutional confrontation ahead of the 2026 polls. With 63.7 lakh deletions and the electorate shrinking to 6.44 crore, Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee challenged the process in the Supreme Court, turning voter verification into a wider political battle with the Election Commission.

title: Amazon sends letter to FCC - Here's what it read
content: Amazon's Leo has urged the FCC to reject SpaceX's ambitious one million-satellite proposal, citing a lack of critical orbital and RF data. Amazon argues the plan is speculative, lacks space safety details, and would take centuries to deploy, potentially monopolizing orbital resources. The filing questions the feasibility and intent behind SpaceX's massive constellation.

title: 'Can’t assist once you exit': Indians told not to leave Iran without embassy nod
content: The Indian Embassy in Tehran has advised Indian nationals in Iran against approaching land border points for exit without prior coordination. The mission emphasized it cannot assist individuals stranded after leaving Iranian territory without entering a third country. This advisory follows the External Affairs Minister's statement on India's focus on dialogue and diplomacy to de-escalate Middle East tensions.

title: How this 65-Year-old woman from Patna built Rs 2.5 crore food empire in 5 years
content: Facing initial disapproval, Devni Devi started a tiffin service from her kitchen at 59 to support her family. Despite societal judgment and personal sacrifices, her dedication to providing nutritious home-cooked meals for students led to growing popularity. Her small venture has now blossomed into a successful restaurant with a significant turnover and a loyal customer base.

title: CBSE postpones Class 12 board exams from March 12-16 in Middle East; new dates to be announced
content: CBSE has postponed Class 12 board exams in several Middle East countries, including Bahrain, Iran, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE, due to the current regional situation. The examinations scheduled between March 12 and March 16, 2026, have been deferred. A review on March 14 will determine the schedule for subsequent exams.

title: Sundar Pichai congratulates Team India on winning the ICC Men's T20 World Cup
content: India achieved a historic T20 World Cup victory, becoming the first nation to defend its title and win on home soil. Their dominant performance against New Zealand, highlighted by exceptional batting and bowling, secured their third T20 World Cup title. Tech leaders Sundar Pichai and Satya Nadella congratulated the team on their remarkable achievement.

title: 'Nothing to do with the stadium': Harbhajan shuts down Ahmedabad 'panauti' talk
content: Former spinner Harbhajan Singh dismissed notions of the Ahmedabad stadium being unlucky for India. He emphasized that match outcomes hinge solely on player performance, citing Australia's superior play in the 2023 World Cup final.  Harbhajan drew parallels to past perceptions of Eden Gardens, asserting that such beliefs stem from those unfamiliar with cricket's realities.

title: Petrol, diesel prices unlikely to rise; India has adequate fuel stocks: Report
content: Good news for Indian consumers as government sources indicate petrol and diesel prices are unlikely to rise despite Middle East tensions. The nation boasts sufficient fuel reserves and stable supply chains. Efforts are also underway to diversify crude oil imports, ensuring energy security and a strong position compared to other nations.

title: Explosives thrown near Mamdani's residence probed as IS-inspired terrorism
content: New York City police are investigating Saturday's protest near Gracie Mansion as an ISIS-inspired terror act after improvised explosive devices were thrown. The devices, containing nuts and bolts, failed to detonate but could have caused severe harm. Two individuals are in custody as authorities collaborate with federal agencies on the probe.

title: 'Career was on the line': Gambhir makes huge Samson admission after World Cup glory
content: Head coach Gautam Gambhir lauded Sanju Samson's exceptional performances during India's T20 World Cup victory. Samson's match-winning contributions, especially in the final, showcased his character under pressure. Gambhir highlighted Samson's comeback and impactful innings, emphasizing his special talent and mental strength. This tournament marks a significant beginning for Samson's promising career.

title: Ranbir Kapoor, Sai Pallavi Ramayana look leak? Ashish Sharma reacts
content: Viral images claiming to show Ranbir Kapoor and Sai Pallavi as Rama and Sita in the upcoming 'Ramayana' film have been confirmed as fake. Actor Ashish Sharma, who previously played Rama, revealed the images were digitally altered from his own show, 'Siya Ke Ram', debunking the 'leaked' photos.

title: Livestream, 150 kmph, then crash! What UK07 rider incident tells about road safety
content: Motovlogger Anurag Dobhal, known as UK07 Rider, livestreamed his high-speed drive on the Delhi-Meerut Expressway, reaching over 150 kmph. The broadcast ended abruptly when he lost control of his Toyota Fortuner and crashed into a barrier, sustaining serious injuries. The incident highlights the dangers of reckless driving and livestreaming while operating a vehicle.

title: Trump's China visit to be confined to Beijing amid security concerns: Report
content: US President Donald Trump's upcoming China visit, scheduled from March 31 to April 2, will be limited to Beijing due to a packed schedule and security concerns. While Chinese officials initially considered a multi-city itinerary, time constraints and logistical challenges led to the decision to focus solely on the capital.

title: 'Shahid Afridi slapped Mohammad Amir': Razzaq's explosive claim
content: A friend's phone repair inadvertently exposed the 2010 spot-fixing plot, revealing messages between a fixer and Pakistan players. Former selector Abdul Razzaq detailed how captain Shahid Afridi confronted young pacer Mohammad Amir, leading to a confession after a slap. This revelation ultimately brought the scandal to light, resulting in bans and jail time for the involved cricketers.

title: 2020 Delhi riots case: Court grants 10-day interim bail to Sharjeel Imam
content: A Delhi court has granted Sharjeel Imam 10-day interim bail in a 2020 Delhi riots case, months after the Supreme Court denied him regular bail. The Supreme Court had previously stated that long incarceration alone isn't enough for bail under UAPA, especially in cases affecting public order and national security.

title: Salim Khan Health Update: Veteran screenwriter stable after brain haemorrhage
content: Veteran screenwriter Salim Khan has been hospitalized following a minor brain hemorrhage. Doctors performed a procedure, and he is now recovering well and is out of danger. Reports indicate he is feeling better and expected to be discharged within the next few days.

title: Putin congratulates Mojtaba Khamenei on appointment as Iran’s new leader, pledges 'unwavering' support
content: Russia's President Putin has pledged 'unwavering support' to Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, following his father's death in airstrikes. Putin expressed confidence in Mojtaba's ability to unite Iran amidst regional conflict. Reports also suggest Russia is sharing real-time intelligence on US military assets in the Middle East with Tehran, potentially aiding in targeting.

title: 'Paaji, kade hass vi leya karo': Arshdeep Singh trolls Gautam Gambhir
content: Team India clinched their third T20 World Cup title, defeating New Zealand in a thrilling final. Celebrations erupted as players, including Arshdeep Singh playfully teasing head coach Gautam Gambhir, shared their joy. Captain Suryakumar Yadav highlighted the importance of mental resilience and team understanding in their historic home victory.

title: Where is JD Vance? The curious case of the 'missing' VP during Iran war
content: That tension became particularly visible during the early days of the Iran war, when Washington’s attention shifted to a curious question that began circulating across political circles and newsrooms alike: where exactly was JD Vance?

title: Middle East tensions force IndiGo Delhi–Manchester flight to make U-turn mid-air
content: An IndiGo flight from Delhi to Manchester returned to Delhi shortly after takeoff. This happened due to sudden airspace restrictions. These restrictions are linked to the evolving situation in West Asia. IndiGo is working with authorities to resume the journey. The airline is also informing passengers about potential delays and diversions on other international routes.

title: Did Israel surprise US with strikes on Iran oil depots? White House reportedly sent 'WTF' message
content: The White House expressed surprise and disapproval after Israel struck Iranian oil facilities, a move not anticipated by the Trump administration. Officials feared the attacks could rally Iranians, boost oil prices, and negatively impact global energy markets. While Israel stated the depots supplied the regime, Washington conveyed strong disagreement, with concerns about rising gas prices.

title: Dehradun MCA student couple stab each other during fight over alleged affair
content: A young couple, first-year MCA students, were injured after allegedly stabbing each other in Dehradun. The altercation reportedly stemmed from accusations of infidelity, with both individuals attacking each other with kitchen knives. They are currently hospitalized and out of danger.

title: Justice for Sanju: A true Kerala story
content: Sanju Samson had scored just 46 runs from five matches against New Zealand. In the off chance he earned against Namibia, things didn't get any better. But luck did shine on him after all, and he repaid the backing with absolute tenacity, finishing as the Player of the Tournament and India's highest run-scorer in a T20 World Cup.

title: Dhurandhar 2 OTT release: Platform and streaming date revealed
content: Ranveer Singh’s 'Dhurandhar 2', directed by Aditya Dhar, releases on March 19. The spy thriller will stream later on OTT, with the date yet to be revealed. Advance bookings cross ₹18 crore. The release follows Yash’s Toxic delay, boosting box-office prospects for this highly awaited sequel.

title: Murmu-Mamata row: BJP calls TMC ‘fake news factory’, hits back over insult to President
content: The BJP has labeled the Trinamool Congress a "fake news factory" after West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee accused the BJP and PM Modi of insulting President Droupadi Murmu. Banerjee presented a photo suggesting the PM was seated while the President stood during an award ceremony, contradicting BJP's claims of protocol adherence.

title: ‘Next stop Olympic gold’: Surya sets LA 2028 target after India's T20 WC win
content: Fresh from a historic T20 World Cup victory at home, Indian captain Suryakumar Yadav has declared the next major ambition: Olympic gold at the 2028 Los Angeles Games.  Following a dominant win against New Zealand, Yadav emphasised the team's shift to an aggressive style, building on their 2024 triumph.  He aims to continue this winning momentum for India.

title: Amid Iran war, US ramping up B-21 Raider production: What makes the next-gen bomber stand out
content: The US Air Force will increase production of its new B-21 Raider stealth bomber. This move aims to speed up deliveries and bolster the nation's long-range strike capabilities. The decision comes amid rising global tensions. The advanced bomber is designed for contested environments and will form the core of the future Air Force bomber fleet.

title: Gold price today: How much gold costs in your city today? Check rates
content: Gold futures experienced a significant drop of Rs 1,052 on Monday, closing at Rs 1,60,582 per 10 grams due to weakened local spot demand and soft global cues. Conversely, silver futures saw an advance, gaining Rs 4,362 to end at Rs 2,63,923 per kilogram on the MCX amid market uncertainties.

title: 2026 Hyundai Verna launched at Rs 10.98 lakh: What's new in Virtus, Slavia rival
content: The 2026 Hyundai Verna facelift continues to be offered with two engine options - a 1.5-litre naturally aspirated petrol (115 hp, 144 nm) with a 6-speed manual or a CVT automatic. Another engine option is a 160 hp, 253 nm, 1.5-litre turbo petrol with a 6-speed manual or a 7-speed DCT.

title: Russia’s anthem returns at Winter Paralympics as Varvara Voronchikhina wins gold
content: For the first time in more than a decade, Russia’s national anthem will be played at the Winter Paralympics after para alpine skier Varvara Voronchikhina won a gold medal at the 2026 Winter Paralympics in Milan-Cortina on Monday. The 23-year-old skier finished first in the women’s super-G standing event, marking a historic moment for Russian sport at the Paralympic Games.

title: Karnataka could be party in case against Kerala government on Malayalam Bhasha Bill that received assent from Kerala Governor
content: In the Legislative Council, Congress member Bilkis Bano pushed the State government to urge the Kerala government to bring an amendment to the legislation to keep Kasaragod district out of its purview

title: MDA sets aside ₹460 crore for developing new layouts
content: MDA announced a surplus Budget of ₹220.72 crore, with projected revenue of ₹799.90 crore and expenditure of ₹579.18 crore

title: Jagruta Mahila Okkoota says GP officials neglecting works by small and marginal farmers
content: Works approved two years ago under the now repealed MGNREGA have not been taken up till today, says activist

title: It took 20 months to rectify ‘wrongdoings’ of the previous govt., says A.P. CM
content: The State will continue on the development trajectory only if the government is given an opportunity to continue for successive terms like in Gujarat, says Chief Minister

title: Lokesh lays foundation for retaining wall along Krishna river
content: The 1.7-km wall between the railway bridge and Varadhi is set to be constructed at an estimated cost of ₹294.20 crore

title: TVK chief Vijay seeks 15-day extension to appear before CBI again in Karur stampede case
content: The matter is under the consideration of the CBI officials concerned, say sources; the party’s chief was asked to join the probe on March 10, which would have been his third appearance before the Central agency

title: PU student-lecturer ratio far above CBSE norms: MLC
content: On lecturers’ petitions, K. Vivekananda raises the issue in the Council, seeks details on the criteria followed to identify surplus lecturer posts in colleges; Minister Madhu Bangarappa says the issue will be discussed with legislators representing the teachers’ and graduates’ constituencies before taking a decision

title: Bird survey in Silent Valley records 192 species
content: The survey was jointly organised by the Kerala Forest department and the Malabar Natural History Society

title: AP-Genco plans two 3,200 MW ultra mega thermal plants
content: Projects proposed in Srikakulam and Talcher (Odisha) to ensure base load power as old TPP units face phased retirement; joint venture with Coal India Limited (CIL) under consideration

title: NITI Aayog lauds southern States for progress in Aspirational Districts Programme
content: With many indicators nearing saturation, the southern States have registered a strong performance, say NITI Aayog members

title: Here are the big stories from Karnataka today
content: Welcome to the Karnataka Today newsletter, your guide from The Hindu on the major news stories to follow today. Curated and written by Nalme Nachiyar.

title: The challenge is in adapting to technological changes, effectively using them, journalism students told
content: Karnatak University Vice-Chancellor A.M. Khan addresses concern about fewer students enrolling for journalism course

title: Two sub-adult elephants electrocuted by illegal snares in Tirupati district
content: A male and a female elephant, aged around 11–12 years, were found dead approximately 450 meters from the Reserve Forest boundary

title: PM Modi emphasises preventive healthcare, calls for stronger caregiver training ecosystem
content: The Prime Minister stresses the need for further simplifying the user experience and building greater public awareness regarding the success of telemedicine

title: Kerala brings out Cyber Safety Protocol in public schools amid AI surge
content: The protocol, published by KITE,  provides targeted directives for institutional heads, teachers, parents, and students and is designed to ensure a secure digital learning environment

title: Over 9,000 bicycles distributed to government school students in Prakasam district, says Minister
content: Gottipati Ravi Kumar claims that the donors contributed ₹12 lakh towards establishment of safe drinking water plants in eight schools, and stresses that with the cooperation of donors, the government schools in the State can be developed on par with private institutions

title: Nitish to embark on last leg of Samriddhi Yatra from March 10
content: The Bihar CM will review ongoing development projects and schemes of government and interact with common people

title: Nanguneri double murder: Family receives body after six days
content: Police persuaded the protesters to accept the body of John on Monday while the kin of Trinath Katta had received the body and cremated it on the next day itself

title: Work on parts of Belagavi bypass road to be completed this month
content: BJP MP Jagadish Shettar reviews road works, says the whole 13.33 km bypass road project is expected to be ready by the end of the year

title: Karnataka government rules out closure of KSIC factory, construction of stadium
content: Minister for Sericulture and Animal Husbandry K. Venkatesh said plans are on to boost the production of Mysore Silk, which is in very high demand.

title: ‘First Announce, Subsequently Think’: Congress’ swipe at Centre on VB-G RAM G Act
content: Jairam Ramesh says that the consultations that should have happened earlier are taking place now and the details are still being worked out

title: 1,249 additional posts created on redeployment basis for election work in Tamil Nadu
content: Amendment proposals for polling stations, mobilisation of EVMs, and selection, appointment, and training of polling and counting personnel will be among the works that are to be initiated in connection with the Assembly polls

title: Tender for restoration of remaining stretch of Mullassery Canal to open this week
content: Of the canal’s total 829-metre length, the stretch up to Chittoor Road was restored last September using the cast-in-situ method

title: Mobile phones seized from prisoners at Parappana Agrahara central jail in Bengaluru
content: The incident has yet again exposes the lapse of multi-layered security checks, including the latest jammers installed, at Bengaluru Central prison.

title: Consensus reached on LDF candidates in Kasaragod district
content: CPI(M)’ K.R. Jayanandan will contest in Manjeswaram, C.H. Kunhambu in Uduma and V.P.P. Mustafa in Thrikkarippur. CPI will contest in Kanhangad and INL in Kasaragod

title: Three-day workshop on language data collection, linguistic annotation begins at Kuvempu University
content: R. Vijay Sundar Ram, senior research engineer at AU-KBC Centre, in his preliminary remarks on the workshop, stated that in the Artificial Intelligence-driven economy, data is the oil

title: Nainar Nagenthran slams DMK government over law and order
content: He claims that murders, robberies, sexual assaults, and machete attacks had become everyday occurrences in the past five years

title: BJP finalises seat-sharing deal with two regional parties for Assam polls
content: Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma says the number of constituencies sought by the Asom Gana Parishad awaits the approval of his party’s Central Parliamentary Board

title: NFL free agency grades: Sizing up the Rashan Gary, Minkah Fitzpatrick trades
content: We're handing out report cards on big moves, including the Rashan Gary and Minkah Fitzpatrick trades.

title: Dolphins to release Tua, take on record cap hit
content: The Dolphins will release quarterback Tua Tagovailoa after the start of the new league year in a move that will leave Miami with an NFL-record $99 million in dead money.

title: Sources: Packers trading DL Gary to Cowboys
content: The Green Bay Packers are finalizing a deal that would send defensive lineman Rashan Gary to the Dallas Cowboys in exchange for a 2027 draft pick, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter. The pick is a fourth-rounder, according to NFL Network.

title: Sources: NFL labor talks with refs hit rough patch
content: The NFL's negotiations with the NFL Referees Association on a new collective bargaining agreement are not in a good place, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Sources: Dolphins trade DB Fitzpatrick to Jets
content: The Dolphins are sending Minkah Fitzpatrick to the Jets in exchange for the 2026 seventh-round pick from the Chargers, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Mass soccer brawl in Brazil leads to 23 red cards
content: Cruzeiro's 1-0 win over Atlético-MG in Sunday's Mineiro Championship final was overshadowed by a mass brawl that erupted seconds before the final whistle and resulted in 23 red cards issued.

title: Sources: Texans to bring back Ingram, Rankins
content: Guard Ed Ingram and defensive tackle Sheldon Rankins will not hit free agency after agreeing to multiyear deals with the Texans, according to ESPN and NFL Network.

title: Steelers to bring back CB Samuel, sources say
content: The Steelers are re-signing corner Asante Samuel Jr. to a one-year, $4 million deal, a source told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.

title: Ngannou to return on MVP's inaugural MMA card
content: Ex-UFC, PFL heavyweight champ Francis Ngannou will return to action on May 16 as part of Jake Paul's Most Valuable Promotions' inaugural MMA fight card headlined by Ronda Rousey vs. Gina Carano.

title: 🔮 Men's Bubble Watch: Santa Clara to get in?
content: Entering the Big Ten tournament, the Hawkeyes remain in good position despite six losses in eight games.

title: Your guide to men's basketball this March: Contenders, stars, storylines to watch
content: The five teams at the top. The players to watch. The narratives likely to shape the conference and NCAA tournaments.

title: NBA stars reflect on Wilt Chamberlain's 'mythical' legacy
content: As Gilgeous-Alexander closes in on breaking the longest 20-point scoring streak, NBA stars reflect on Chamberlin's legacy.

title: Did NIL kill the upset? Why power conferences just keep dominating in March
content: Where did all the Cinderella stories who busted our brackets go? Inside why the madness seems to be vanishing.

title: Champ Week takeaways: Top seeds and NCAA hosts set, but should UConn or UCLA be No. 1 overall?
content: A week before Selection Sunday, which teams should be worried (Tennessee) or encouraged (Notre Dame)? And what's the state of the bubble?

title: Women's Bracketology: Championship Sunday brings clarity to No. 1 seeds, top 16
content: Texas locked up the No. 3 overall seed, Duke moved to a No. 2 and West Virginia should host tournament games.

title: When will Cole return? Is Dominguez a trade candidate? What to expect from six make-or-break Yankees
content: Reinforcements? Trade bait? Some key players won't be on the field in the Bronx on Opening Day. Here's what that means.

title: How Jurickson Profar helped sign his replacement -- and next steps for the Braves
content: In the wake of Profar's suspension, Yastrzemski's signing has become even more important for Atlanta.

title: NHL Awards Watch: Celebrini challenges for MVP; dead heat for Norris
content: With about a month left in the season, here's how PHWA voters are feeling about all the major awards.

title: NHL playoff watch: The Blue Jackets' path to the playoffs
content: Columbus is in the mix after adding Conor Garland. Plus, projections, draft lottery standings and more.

title: 2026 Players Championship: Ranking the top 25 players in the field
content: We run through the top contenders among the 123-man field to win the PGA Tour's flagship event at TPC Sawgrass.

title: 'LOL THATS IT?': MMA fighters react to UFC White House card
content: The polarizing fight card generated online comments from stars such as Conor McGregor and Sean O'Malley.

title: UFC 326 fight grades: The F in BMF stands for fail
content: The BMF title headliner between Charles Oliveira and Max Holloway earned the lowest grade at UFC 326.

title: MLS Power Rankings: Vancouver the early-season team to beat
content: Three games in and the Vancouver Whitecaps are absolutely purring. All that and more in this week's edition of ESPN's MLS Power Rankings.

title: Predicting the USWNT's World Cup starting lineup
content: With 2027 closer than you think, we forecast the 11 players Emma Hayes will count on for the tournament.

title: The pride and power of Iowa State basketball's Audi Crooks
content: Audi Crooks hears the haters. But Iowa State's star inherited resilience from her mom and joy from her dad. Her high-scoring game is the ultimate counterpoint.

title: Australian GP overreactions: Verstappen could quit F1? McLaren on the ropes?
content: After a wild, often polarising Australian Grand Prix weekend, ESPN looks at some of the sweeping generalisations being made about Formula 1 and judges whether they're overblown or not.

title: Milan's big derby win; Arsenal's FA Cup scare; Yamal stars again for Barcelona; more
content: Milan's derby win over Inter has opened a little bit of a title race again in Italy ... at least for now. Plus: Arsenal messed around in the FA Cup and nearly paid for it, while Lamine Yamal showed just how great he is for Barcelona.

title: Why Premier League giants can't afford to miss UCL riches
content: The price of failure increases as the importance of the Champions League never goes away for big clubs.

title: Pickups: Bulls backcourt among top waiver wire options
content: Every week in fantasy basketball, there are available players who can help fill holes in your roster. Here are the ones to add for the week ahead.

title: Transfer rumors, news: USMNT defender Robinson wants Liverpool over Man United
content: Fulham and USMNT left back Antonee Robinson favors a move to Liverpool over Manchester United. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Sharjeel Imam Granted 10-Day Interim Bail To Attend Brother's Wedding
content: A court here on Monday granted 10-day interim bail to activist Sharjeel Imam, an accused in the 2020 Delhi riots case, for attending his brother's wedding.

title: Blistering Heatwave Hits Mumbai And Thane, Yellow Alert Issued
content: A blistering heatwave has swept across Mumbai, Thane, Palghar, and adjoining districts, prompting the India Meteorological Department (IMD) to issue heat warnings through Wednesday, March 11.

title: Lucky Numbers And Collusion: How An Indian Cement Cartel Came Unstuck
content: When India's largest oil explorer opened a tender for a cement order in 2018, it sensed something was off by the competing bids coming in: all of them were exactly 7,000 rupees per tonne.

title: Centre Extends LPG Refill Booking Period To 25 Days To Curb Hoarding: Report
content: To prevent hoarding and black marketing, the booking period for LPG gas cylinders has been increased from 21 to 25 days, as per government sources.

title: In Iran-US-Israel War, The Multiverse Of Copycat Drones
content: Built by Lockheed Martin and operated by the United States Air Force for the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA), the flying-wing drone was designed to penetrate hostile airspace undetected, gathering reconnaissance imagery and signals intelligence.

title: Class 4 Girl Lured With Berries, Raped By 2 Boys In UP's Hathras
content: A nine-year-old girl was allegedly raped by two minors in the Sikandra Rau Police Station area here, police said on Saturday.

title: 'Ahmedabad Dreamliner Crash Report Likely By Year-End': Aviation Minister
content: Civil Aviation Minister K Rammohan Naidu on Monday informed the Rajya Sabha that the probe into the crash of Air India flight AI171 is progressing "at a very good pace".

title: Trump Started War Against Iran. He's Still Figuring Out How It Ends
content: A week into the Iran war, what Trump actually wants remains, at best, unclear, and his own statements suggest even he may not know.

title: In Pics: Zelensky Aged Visibly By War's Toll, Putin Frozen Exactly Since 2022
content: The contrast between Volodymyr Zelensky and Vladimir Putin is one of the most defining visual stories of the war itself.

title: Trump Says Iran Will Work Like Venezuela. Here's How Different 2 Nations Are
content: When Maduro fell, Rodriguez was ready and willing. When Khamenei was killed, Tehran did not quietly wait for America's next instructions. It ruled out any talks, launched an attack, and made clear that the remaining leadership intended to fight.

title: "One Phone Call From PM Modi To Israel And Iran Can End Issue": UAE Envoy
content: The UAE has no desire to be drawn into the Iran-Israel conflict and will not allow its territory to be used as a launching pad by either side, Hussain Hassan Mirza, the first UAE Ambassador to India, told NDTV today.

title: Saudi Arabia Starts Reducing Oil Production As Hormuz Closure Fills Storage
content: Saudi Arabia has started reducing oil production as the near-blockage of the critical Strait of Hormuz starts filling storage tanks, according to a person familiar with the matter, even as it rushes to reroute some supplies through the Red Sea.

title: Madhya Pradesh High Court Cancels Congress MLA's Election, Declares BJP Ex-Minister Winner
content: In a dramatic political twist from Madhya Pradesh's Chambal region, the Gwalior bench of the Madhya Pradesh High Court has set aside the election of Congress MLA Mukesh Malhotra from the Vijaypur Assembly seat.

title: Meta Strengthens AI Efforts With New Engineering Team
content: Meta Platforms is forming a new applied AI engineering team to boost its work on superintelligence. The team will be led by Maher Saba, a vice president at Meta's Reality Labs, according to an internal memo reviewed by The Wall Street Journal.

title: Iran-Israel War LIVE Updates: 10 Explosions Heard In Tel Aviv After Iran Launches New Missile Strikes
content: US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: Saudi Arabia sharpened its warnings to Iran early Monday, telling Tehran it would be the "biggest loser" if it continues to attack Arab states.

title: Putin Offers "Unwavering Support" To Iran's New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei
content: Russian President Vladimir Putin on Monday pledged "unwavering support" to Iran's new supreme leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, appointed after his father and predecessor was killed in US-Israeli strikes.

title: "We've Lost Contact": Russian Workers Stuck At Iran Nuclear Plant Amid War
content: Russia's state nuclear company, Rosatom, is preparing to evacuate a second group of personnel and family members from Iran's Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant. This includes workers involved in constructing Units 2 and 3.

title: Father, Mother, Wife, Son: Every Family Member Mojtaba Khamenei Lost In Iran War
content: Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of Ali Khamenei and the new Supreme Leader of the Islamic nation, has lost at least two family members to the strikes by Israel and the US, according to reports.

title: 5 Reasons Why Markets Shed A Whopping 12 Lakh Crore Valuation Today
content: Indian equities witnessed a sharp sell-off on Monday as a spike in crude oil prices, foreign investor outflows and a broader global risk-off sentiment rattled markets.
